name: @martian-engineering/lossless-claw
description: Lossless Context Management plugin for OpenClaw — DAG-based conversation summarization with incremental compaction
author: Josh Lehman <josh@martian.engineering>

scripts.build: node -e "const { copyFileSync, mkdirSync, rmSync } = require('node:fs'); rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const { copyFileSync, mkdirSync } = require('node:fs'); mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true }); copyFileSync('openclaw.plugin.json', 'dist/openclaw.plugin.json');"
scripts.release:verify: npm run build && npm test && npm pack --dry-run
